description: Generate, apply, and verify production-ready React and shadcn UI from natural-language briefs.
name: openui-mcp-studio

scripts.ci:acceptance:gate: npm run docs:completeness:check && npm run test:acceptance:gate
scripts.clean:runtime:check: node --input-type=module -e "import path from 'node:path'; const cwd = process.cwd(); const workspacePrefix = cwd + path.sep; const targets = ['.runtime-cache/runs', '.runtime-cache/cache', '.runtime-cache/build', '.runtime-cache/reports/quality-trend', '.runtime-cache/reports/history-audit', '.runtime-cache/reports/release-readiness', '.runtime-cache/reports/security', '.runtime-cache/reports/upstream'].map((dir) => path.resolve(cwd, dir)); const outsideWorkspace = targets.filter((target) => !target.startsWith(workspacePrefix)); if (outsideWorkspace.length > 0) { console.error(JSON.stringify({ ok: false, reason: 'unsafe-target', outsideWorkspace }, null, 2)); process.exit(1); } console.log(JSON.stringify({ ok: true, mode: 'dry-run-equivalent', targets }, null, 2));"
scripts.docs:check: npm run docs:lint && npm run docs:consistency:check
scripts.docs:check:strict: npm run docs:check && npm run docs:manual-fact:check && npm run proof:pack:check
scripts.docs:consistency:check: npm run docs:render:check && npm run docs:linkcheck && npm run docs:scope:check
scripts.governance:observability:check: node tooling/check-log-schema.mjs && node tooling/check-evidence-governance.mjs && node tooling/check-run-correlation.mjs
scripts.governance:upstream:check: npm run -s governance:pinned-source:check && node tooling/check-upstream-governance.mjs && npm run -s governance:compat-matrix:check && npm run -s governance:patch-registry:check && npm run -s governance:upstream-failure-classification:check
scripts.governance:final:check: npm run -s governance:identity-alignment:check && npm run -s governance:language-boundary:check && npm run -s governance:tracked-surface:check && npm run -s governance:open-source-surface:check && npm run -s governance:remote-evidence:check && npm run -s governance:ssot:check && npm run -s governance:topology:check && npm run -s governance:public-surface:check && npm run -s governance:module-readme:check && npm run -s governance:root:check && npm run -s governance:root-pristine:check && npm run -s governance:deps:check && npm run -s governance:history-hygiene:check && npm run -s governance:runtime:check && npm run -s governance:runtime-layout:check && npm run -s governance:cache-lifecycle:check && npm run -s governance:space:check && npm run -s governance:upstream-policy:check && npm run -s governance:log-schema:check && npm run -s governance:evidence:check && npm run -s governance:run-correlation:check && npm run -s governance:no-wild-log:check && npm run -s governance:pinned-source:check && npm run -s governance:upstream:check && npm run -s governance:workflow:check && npm run -s iac:check && npm run -s governance:score:check && npm run -s verify:clean-room
scripts.hooks:install: git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 && git config core.hooksPath .githooks || true
scripts.lint:biome: biome lint --diagnostic-level=error --files-ignore-unknown=true services/mcp-server/src tests tooling package.json biome.json
scripts.mutation:run:gate: npm run -s mutation:run:full && npm run -s mutation:gate
scripts.postinstall: node --input-type=module -e "import { existsSync } from 'node:fs'; import { spawnSync } from 'node:child_process'; const runner = process.platform === 'win32' ? 'node_modules/.bin/patch-package.cmd' : 'node_modules/.bin/patch-package'; if (!existsSync(runner)) { console.log('patch-package not installed; skip postinstall apply'); process.exit(0); } const result = spawnSync(runner, ['--patch-dir', 'ops/upstream/patches/patch-package'], { stdio: 'inherit', shell: true }); process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"
scripts.public:surface:check: npm run -s public:assets:check && npm run -s public:remote:check
scripts.release:public-safe:check: npm run -s docs:check:strict && node tooling/check-release-readiness.mjs --strict-authoritative-runs && npm run -s governance:remote-evidence:check:strict && npm run -s governance:history-hygiene:check
scripts.rollback:drill: git config user.name "rollback-drill" && git config user.email "rollback-drill@local" && git switch -c rollback-drill-$(date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S) && git commit --allow-empty -m "ci: rollback drill marker" && marker=$(git rev-parse HEAD) && git revert --no-edit "$marker" && git log --oneline -2
scripts.test:fast:gate: npm run -s test:unit:gate && npm run -s test:integration:gate && npm run -s test:acceptance:gate
scripts.test:integration:gate: node --env-file-if-exists=.env ./node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run tests/openui-client.test.ts tests/retriever.test.ts tests/rag-upsert-search.test.ts tests/mcp-integration.test.ts tests/apply-rollback.test.ts tests/runtime-config.test.ts tests/e2e-no-hard-wait.test.ts
scripts.test:unit:gate: node --env-file-if-exists=.env ./node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run tests/path-utils.test.ts tests/json-utils.test.ts tests/process-utils.test.ts tests/child-env.test.ts
scripts.uiux:audit:strict:gate: npm run -s uiux:audit:strict && npm run -s uiux:a11y:axe -- --strict --mode=changed
